SpTU 5, 235 [Udug-hul Varia][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

x [...]

(o 1') You sprinkle ... [...]. You make [...]. ... [...]. Wipe clean with [...]. You say over him [...]. You bring [...]. [...] the incantation 'Evil udug-demon [...]'.

o 2'2'

tu-⸢sar⸣-[raq? ...]

o 3'3'

DU₃uš E x [...]

o 4'4'

U.ME.TE.⸢GUR⸣.[GUR ...]

o 5'5'

e-li-šu₂ ta-[qab?-bi? ...]

o 6'6'

tu-qar-rab [...]

o 7'7'

EN₂ udug ḫul [...]

o 8'8'

DU₃.DU₃-BI gišPI DU₃⸢uš⸣ [...]

(o 8') The accompanying ritual: You set in place a .... [...]. [...] meat from a ram and meat from a bird. May they prosper inside. [...] .... You are adjured by the life of the Anunnaku, the great gods. You wipe the invalid clean. May this person be cleansed. [...] ... their ... and their .... You make a cake. In the same way as the cake may ... be calmed. You wipe the invalid clean. Just as before. You recite overhead the incantation 'The evil udug-demon ransacks the man'.

o 9'9'

UZU UDU.NITA₂ UZU MUŠEN [...]

o 10'10'

ina lib₃-bi liš-ru-u₂ MU x [x] x ⸢SAG⸣ x [x (x)]

o 11'11'

ZI dA.NUN.NA.KE-E.NE DINGIR ⸢GAL⸣.GAL-E.NE I?.[RI?.PAD₃?]

o 12'12'

mar-ṣa ⸢tu⸣-[kap]-⸢par⸣ LU₂.U₁₈.LU BI ḪE₂.EN.SIKIL.LA

o 13'13'

x [x] x x x-šu₂-nu x x x-šu₂-nu-ma x x

Reverse
r 1r 1

ka-man DU₃uš lib₃-bu-u₂ ka-man tur-ra-ta ŠA₃ UDU.NITA₂

r 22

ḪA?.BA.ḪUN.GA₂ mar-ṣa tu-kap-par KI.MIN GIM

r 33

EN₂ udug ḫul-ŋal₂ lu₂-ra in-kar-kar ina UGU

r 44

ŠIDnu

r 55

DU₃.DU₃-BI NINDA KILIB.BA ta-<ra>-sa₃-an NINDA KI!.LIB! KI E.TUR-MEŠDU₃uš x LAL₃ I₃.NUN.NA  ; ŠA₃ 15 u ŠA₃ 2.30

(r 5) The accompanying ritual: You soak (gloss: make the lumps (of dough) small for) a baked loaf and you shape it. You anoint him with ..., honey and butter on the right and the left. You wipe the invalid clean with 7 times 7 (pieces of) bread. You recite overhead (the incantation) 'Like heaven the namtar-demon'.

r 66

ŠEŠ₂-su x TA NINDA 7.NA A.RA₂ 7.NA mar-ṣa tu-kap-par1

r 77

nam-tar an-gin₇ ina muḫ-ḫi ŠIDnu

r 88

DU₃.DU₃-BI 2 ḫu-um-bi-iṣ-ṣe-e-tu₂ ša₂ IM DU₃uš TAmim-ma [x] x [x]  ; ŠA₃ 15 u ŠA₃ 2.30

(r 8) The accompanying ritual: You form 2 swollen lumps from clay and [...] ... everything on the right and the left. Wipe clean and you wipe the invalid clean. As before. You recite overhead the incantation 'Clay [...] is available from the earth'.

r 99

U.ME.TE.GUR.GUR mar-ṣa tu-kap-par KI.MIN! EN₂ ⸢im?⸣ [x x]2

r 1010

ki-a mu-un-ŋal₂ ina muḫ-ḫi ŠIDnu

r 1111

DU₃.DU₃-BI 2 ḫu-um-bi-ṣe-e-tu₂ ša₂ ⸢MUNU₅⸣ [...]

(r 11) The accompanying ritual: [...] 2 swollen lumps from malt. Wipe clean and [...] on his side and you wipe [...] clean. Just as before. [...] overhead [...] ....

r 1212

U.ME.TE.GUR.GUR BAR-RA.NA U.ME.⸢TE⸣.[...]

r 1313

tu-kap-par KI.MIN! ⸢GIM?⸣ [...]3

r 1414

[x] x DI? PAB? ina? ⸢muḫ⸣-[ḫi ...]

(rest of reverse missing)

1third sign an erasure 7.NA presumably something to do with imin

2Text DI for KI.

3Text DI for KI.
